1.5" OLED Preview

Layout simulator for display_waveshare_15_i2c.cpp — approximate Adafruit GFX rendering at 128×128, scaled for desktop review before flashing.

Ready

Telemetry JSON 

        

      


      

        

          
        

        
128×128 px — physical 1.5″ panel


        

          
Device buttons ↑ ↓ Space

          

            
            
            
          

          

            UP+DOWN hold
            

          

          

            Trigger hold
            

          

          
    
            
  • UP / DOWN — speed ± (main) or page ± (menu)
    • 
            
  • UP+DOWN hold 1.5 s — open / close dev menu
    • 
            
  • TRIGGER hold 1.25 s — start motor; tap — stop
    • 
            
  • TRIGGER on settings page — cycle value
    •
